functional_purpose: Receives DICOM studies, extracts patient, study, device, and AE-title metadata, then submits the DICOM payload to OpenEyes PayloadProcessor. It also writes supported Zeiss IOLMaster DICOM objects to the IOLMasterImport incoming folder.
business_process: Ingestion and processing of ophthalmic imaging, including IOLMaster biometry import.

destination_connectors.name: Write out file to IolMasterImport incoming folder when device is a Zeiss IOLMaster

ack_behaviour: DICOM Listener auto-generates its response after the source transformer and responds after processing.
main_filters: No source or destination filter rules.
main_transformer_stages: Maps DICOM patient, study, device, SOP Class, and local/remote AE-title tags into channel variables.
Derives identifier_type and institution_id from the local AE title, defaulting from configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType.
Sets source_platform for ImageNET or Forum AE titles.
Removes the IOLMaster file destination unless manufacturer, model, and SOP Class identify a supported Zeiss IOLMaster object.
error_handling: No explicit error handling; destination validation is disabled.
retry_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0 for both destinations.
queue_behaviour: Source queue buffer is 1000; both destinations have queueEnabled false.

evidence.claim: ENHT channel DICOM (da67d2ba-db52-4f50-898b-b534d71450ab), source ENHT/Dicom.xml, is a DICOM Listener on port 11112 and maps DICOM tags in its source transformer.
evidence.location: source connector DICOMReceiverProperties and source transformer mapper steps Patient_Name through remote_AET

evidence.claim: The channel submits application/dicom with request_type dicom_request to the OpenEyes PayloadProcessor endpoint using preemptive HTTP Basic authentication.
evidence.location: destination PayloadProcessor API Send HTTP Sender properties

evidence.claim: The IOLMaster file destination is retained only for supported Zeiss IOLMaster manufacturer, model, and SOP Class values and writes to /mnt/dicom.
evidence.location: source transformer JavaScript step Remove the IOLMaster Import destination if device is not a Zeiss IOL Master; destination File Writer properties

evidence.claim: The channel reads configurationMap:defaultPatientIdentifierType while deriving identifier_type and institution_id.
evidence.location: source transformer JavaScript step Extract identifier_type and institution_id from Local AET

functional_purpose: Polls a local document drop for matching files and forwards each file unchanged to an SFTP destination. Successfully processed source files are deleted.
business_process: Outbound document and correspondence file transfer.
main_filters: File Reader regex accepts names matching ^OPENEYES_(?!Internal).*$; no Mirth filter rules.
main_transformer_stages: No source or destination transformations; the File Writer sends message.encodedData with the original filename.
error_handling: File read errors take no action; error responses move the source file to /mnt/docman/error.
retry_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0.
queue_behaviour: Source and destination queue buffers are 1000; destination queueing is disabled.

evidence.claim: ENHT channel Docman (04524f4d-5201-4c16-b66f-26c3d7783d85), source ENHT/Docman.xml, polls /mnt/docman every 5000 ms using a File Reader and selects OPENEYES-prefixed files excluding Internal.
The channel transfers original binary content with its original filename through an SFTP File Writer, using redacted credentials.
The source file is deleted after processing, while error responses are moved to /mnt/docman/error.
evidence.location: source connector FileReceiverProperties afterProcessingAction and errorResponseAction settings

functional_purpose: Receives inbound ADT HL7v2 messages from the PAS over MLLP and updates OpenEyes patient, appointment, and patient-merge resources through PASAPI V2. Destination filters direct merges, appointment changes, and patient updates to their relevant endpoints.
business_process: Synchronisation of PAS patient demographics, appointments, attendance status, cancellations, and patient merges into OpenEyes.
ack_behaviour: The MLLP TCP Listener auto-generates an HL7 ACK before processing; configured success, error, and reject codes are AA, AE, and AR.
main_filters: Clinic List - PUT accepts A01, A02, A03, A05, A08, A11, A12, and A13, except A08 with PV1.4 CANCL.
Patient Merge and Secondary Patient accept A40.
main_transformer_stages: Patient and secondary-patient destinations transform PID and PD1 data to PASAPI Patient XML and derive hospital numbers.
Appointment processing derives visit ID, date, time, clinic, doctor, admission source, and attendance status from HL7 segments.
Patient and secondary-patient response transformers parse PASAPI XML, treat most warnings as errors, and retain PatientId for appointment submission.
Patient Merge builds a PatientMerge XML document from primary and secondary hospital numbers.
error_handling: Patient response transformers set responseStatus to ERROR for PASAPI warnings other than missing GP or Practice; mapping scripts log caught exceptions.
retry_behaviour: All HTTP destinations have queueEnabled false and retryCount 0.
queue_behaviour: Source queue buffer is 1000; all destination queues are disabled.
logging: Mapping exceptions are logged; the DoctorCode transformer logs PD1.4.1, creating a potential PII or clinician-identifier logging risk.

evidence.claim: ENHT channel PAS In (7a7288a3-5ade-46bc-921d-56baf0a6bf06), source ENHT/PAS.xml, accepts HL7V2 using a TCP Listener on port 6661 with MLLP framing and 2.4 in the supplied inbound template.
evidence.location: source connector TcpReceiverProperties, MLLPModeProperties, HL7v2 data type properties, and inbound template

evidence.claim: The channel sends preemptive HTTP Basic PUT and DELETE requests to PASAPI V2 Patient, PatientAppointment, and PatientMerge endpoints.
evidence.location: HTTP Sender properties for PASAPI - Secondary Patient, PASAPI - Patient, Clinic List - PUT, Clinic List - DELETE, and PASAPI - Patient Merge

evidence.claim: Appointment submission accepts the listed ADT trigger events and translates their status, including DNA, attendance, transfer, discharge, and cancellation-related handling.
evidence.location: Clinic List - PUT filter Appointment Filter and its transformer JavaScript step VisitStatusXML

evidence.claim: Patient merge destinations are filtered to A40 and create PatientMerge XML using primary and secondary hospital numbers.
evidence.location: PASAPI - Secondary Patient and PASAPI - Patient Merge filters and transformers

functional_purpose: Accepts an HTTP request containing a hospital or NHS number, builds an HL7 QBP^Q21 query, and sends it by MLLP to a remote PAS. It converts the returned K21 response to an XML Patient response for the HTTP caller, or returns an empty PatientList if no transformed response exists.
business_process: On-demand patient demographic lookup in the remote PAS for OpenEyes or another HTTP caller.
ack_behaviour: The HTTP Listener returns the response from the Respond destination; it returns transformed patient XML when available, otherwise <PatientList/>.
main_filters: The source parameter-presence filter is disabled.
Send Q21 requires a nonempty QPD.3.1 search value.
Response conversion and creation require Send Q21 to have status SENT.
main_transformer_stages: Sets the QBP MSH timestamp and message ID.
Places hosnum or nhsnum from HTTP Parameters into QPD.3.1.
Converts the Send Q21 HL7 response to XML and transforms K21 patient demographics into a Patient XML response.
Returns the transformed response or an empty PatientList to the HTTP caller.
error_handling: If no transformed response is available, Respond returns an empty PatientList; no explicit error handler is configured.
retry_behaviour: Destination queueing is disabled and retryCount is 0; Send Q21 has a 60-second response timeout and queueOnResponseTimeout false.
queue_behaviour: Source and destination queue buffers are 1000; all destination queues are disabled.

evidence.claim: ENHT channel PAS Out (cbc80f6b-73ad-491b-adc6-602ed5705c8b), source ENHT/PAS.xml, is an unauthenticated HTTP Listener on port 6663 that creates HL7v2 output.
evidence.location: source connector HttpReceiverProperties and source transformer

evidence.claim: The source transformer creates a QBP^Q21 query and puts the HTTP hosnum or nhsnum parameter into QPD.3.1.
evidence.location: source transformer JavaScript steps Set MSH.7.1 to current date/time, Set MSH.10.1 to message ID, and Set hosnum or nhsnum parameter; outbound template

evidence.claim: Send Q21 is a TCP Sender using MLLP to a remote host on port 20002 and only runs when QPD.3.1 has a value.
evidence.location: destination Send Q21 TcpDispatcherProperties and JavaScript filter

evidence.claim: The channel converts the Send Q21 response to XML, transforms K21 PID data to Patient XML, and returns that XML or an empty PatientList to the HTTP caller.
evidence.location: destinations Convert K21 to XML, Create response, and Respond scripts and XSLT transform
